query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "agent explorative policy optimization for multimodal agentic reasoning" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational survey and canonical reference for the core mechanism of "agentic reasoning" and "agentic policy optimization" mentioned in the user's question, providing the necessary background on the paradigm shift from static LLMs to autonomous agents that any follow-up work on this topic would cite.
